SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?coach WHERE {
  ?coach wdt:P1484 ?wins .
  FILTER(?wins > 2)
}
```

         wdt:P585 ?event_date;
         wdt:P121 ?team.

  ?team wdt:P361 wd:Q19602. # using correct NFL ID

  ?team p:P109 ?statement.
  ?statement ps:P109 ?coach.
  ?statement pq:P580 ?start_date.
  ?statement pq:P582 ?end_date.

  BIND(YEAR(xsd:date(?event_date)) AS ?event_year)
  BIND(YEAR(xsd:date(?start_date)) AS ?start_year)
  BIND(YEAR(xsd:date(?end_date)) AS ?end_year)

  FILTER (?event_year >= ?start_year && ?event_year <= ?end_year)
}
GROUP BY ?coach
HAVING (COUNT(?event) > 2)

Let me write the SPARQL query with these corrections.

Query:

SELECT ?coach (COUNT(?superbowl) AS ?wins)
WHERE {
  ?superbowl wdt:P31 wd:Q12164 ;
             wdt:P1422 ?winning_team ;
             wdt:P585 ?event_date.
  ?winning_team wdt:P1076 wd:Q19602 .
  ?winning_team p:P109 ?coach_statement.
  ?coach_statement ps:P109 ?coach ;
                  pq:P580 ?start_date ;
                  pq:P582 ?end_date.
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?event_date), 1, 4) AS ?event_year)
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?start_date), 1, 4) AS ?start_year)
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?end_date), 1, 4) AS ?end_year)
  FILTER (xsd:integer(?event_year) >= xsd:integer(?start_year) &&
          xsd:integer(?event_year) <= xsd:integer(?end_year))
}
GROUP BY ?coach
HAVING (COUNT(?superbowl) > 2)

This should correctly link Super Bowl winners (teams in NFL) to their coaches and count the wins.
